name: Engine Guardian
location: The Engine Guardian in Darkshade Caverns II, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you use an ability that costs resources, you have a 25% chance to summon a Dwemer automaton to restore 12-550 Stamina or Magicka or 45-1955 Health to you every 0.5 seconds for 6 seconds. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds.
